name: Reasonable Cause Exception for Fuel Tax Claims

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who made excessive claims under sections 6416(a)(4), 6420, 6421, 6427, or 6435 but can prove the error was not due to willful neglect.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid a penalty equal to twice the excessive amount claimed for non-taxable fuel use (e.g., farming or non-highway use) by demonstrating the claim was due to reasonable cause.
